title: Vežba 63

answers.answer: She usually is very careful with her work.
answers.feedback: Usually treba da dođe pre glavnog glagola kada to be nije korišćen. Ispravna rečenica je She is usually very careful with her work.

answers.answer: He is usually the last one to leave the office.
They plays usually together on weekends.
answers.feedback: Usually Trebalo bi da stoji pre glavnog glagola u običnim rečenicama. Ispravna rečenica je They usually play together on weekends.

answers.answer: We usually are happy to help out with new projects.
answers.feedback: Za glagol to be, usually dolazi nakon njega. Ispravna rečenica je We are usually happy to help out with new projects.

description:
Postoje određene reči koje možete koristiti u svojoj rečenici da pokažete koliko često se nešto dešava. Zove se prilogovi frekvencije.

Usually je reč koja ukazuje da se nešto dešava često, ali ne uvek.

Kada usually se koristi sa glagolom to be, postavlja se nakon glagola. Na primer, She is usually on time for meetings.

Kod nekih glagola, usually dolazi pre glavnog glagola. Na primer, He usually works late.
